name: Roadside Assistance Website
description: A platform designed to provide quick and reliable towing and mechanic booking services. Dhinakaran contributed as a Frontend Developer & Market Research Analyst, designing responsive user interfaces.

name: Spendo - Budget Tracking App
description: A budget tracking application that helps users manage their finances effectively with intuitive interfaces, transaction filters, and responsive analytical graphs.

name: Agri Weather Suite
description: An award-winning agriculture advisory weather application and chatbot that won the PyExpo Hackathon with a ₹10,000 cash prize.

name: IoT Driver Safety Device
description: A driving safety hardware device engineered to emit a loud alarm sound to alert drivers if their eyes close, preventing accidents.
